backstory.original: Sentry, protector of the Kingdom of Solwynn, is an ancient relic on her plane. Long ago, a dark power obliterated Sentry's peaceful home, forcing her to power down until a new purpose could wake her. Now, with her ceremonial axe, and memories of Solwynn guiding her, Sentry devotes herself to protecting the friends fighting alongside her. Despite being thrust into a new world eons beyond the one she knew, Sentry defends the good of the world from the dark reaches of evil's grasp. She will not fail again.
backstory.display: 哨兵是索尔文王国的保护者，是她所在位面的一件古老遗物。很久以前，一股黑暗的力量摧毁了哨兵平静的家园并迫使她陷入沉眠，直到有新的目标将她唤醒。如今，哨兵带着她的仪式之斧和对索尔文的记忆，致力于保护与她并肩作战的朋友。尽管被推入一个超越她所认知世界的新时代，哨兵仍然捍卫着世界的美好，使其不受邪恶黑暗的控制。她不会再失败。

description.original: Sentry attacks the nearest enemy with her Battleaxe, which explodes with radiant light.
description.display: 哨兵用她的战斧攻击距离最近的敌人，战斧上的热能之光会产生爆炸。

description.original: Sentry charges into battle atop a transformed echo, dealing damage over time with her flame lance.
description.display: 哨兵驾驭着转换形态的回声冲进战场，用她的烈焰长枪造成持续伤害。

longDescription.original: Sentry charges into battle atop a transformed echo, dealing damage over time with her flame lance.
longDescription.display: 哨兵驾驭着转换形态的回声冲进战场，用她的烈焰长枪造成持续伤害。

description.original: Sentry buffs Champions within two slots of herself as long as she's in the front column of the formation.
description.display: 只要哨兵处于阵型前排，她就会为自己身边两格内的勇士提供增益。

description.original: Sentry's companion, Echo, buffs the party in unique ways depending on its combat status throughout each area.
description.display: 哨兵的伙伴回声根据其在每个区域的战斗状态，为整个队伍提供独特的增益。

description.desc: Increases the damage of Champions within two slots of Sentry by $amount%
距离哨兵 2 格内勇士的伤害提高 $amount%

tipText.original: Sentry buffs those near her, so make sure your main DPS is nearby.
tipText.display: 哨兵为靠近自己的勇士提供增益，所以务必让主力伤害输出靠近她。

description.desc: Echo accompanies Sentry in the formation. Echo has multiple effects based on whether Sentry wasn't, currently is, or was ever under attack in the current area. $echo_description
回声会在阵型中陪伴哨兵。根据哨兵在当前区域内未受到攻击、当前正受到攻击或曾经受到攻击等不同情况，回声会产生各种不同的效果。$echo_description

tipText.original: Sentry's companion, Echo, buffs the party based on whether or not Sentry has been attacked recently.
tipText.display: 哨兵的伙伴回声会根据哨兵最近有没有受到攻击来强化队伍。

description.desc: Increases the chance of Echo Resolution triggering by $(amount)% (additively).
使回声决心的触发几率提高 $(amount)%（以加算方式堆叠）
Guardian of Solwynn is now only active if Sentry is in the front-most column of the formation, but its effect is increased by $amount%
只有当哨兵处于阵型的最前列时，“索尔文的守护者”才会激活，但其效果提高 $amount%

specializationDescription.original: Sentry increases her buff to damage,but only from the front
specializationDescription.display: 哨兵提高她的伤害增益效果，但只能在前排

description.desc: Sentry gains the Control role and her Divine Strike has a $(amount)% chance to ensnare affected enemies in a circle of vines, stunning them for $(duration) seconds.
哨兵获得控制者角色，她的神圣打击有 $(amount)% 几率通过藤蔓圈诱捕受影响的敌人，使其眩晕 $(duration) 秒

specializationDescription.original: Sentry's base attacks gain a chance to ensnare affected enemies in a circle of vines, stunning them for a short time.
specializationDescription.display: 哨兵的基本攻击有几率通过藤蔓圈诱捕受影响的敌人，使其在短时间内眩晕。

specializationDescription.original: Sentry increases her ability to buff nearby allies by a significant amount.
specializationDescription.display: 哨兵大幅提高她为附近盟友施加的增益。

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_amplification_amount,100","description":"Increases the effect of Echo's Amplification ability by 100%"}

description.desc: Increases the health of all other Champions in the formation by $(amount)% of Sentry's max health.
提升阵型中其他所有勇士的生命值，数值相当于哨兵最大生命值的 $(amount)%

Sentry contributes one stack to Aerois Synergy every time an enemy spawns, and for each second a boss has been alive. Their maximum number of stacks is 200 plus the highest area completed in the current run divided by 5 (rounded down). 10% of her contributed stacks are removed when changing areas. Guardian of Solwynn is increased by 10% times the total number of Aerois Synergy stacks.
每次刷新一名敌人，以及首领每存活一秒，哨兵为埃罗伊斯协同贡献一层堆叠。其最大堆叠层数为 200 加上当前关卡中完成的最高区域除以 5（向下舍入）。改变区域时，移除她所贡献堆叠的 10%。“索尔文的守护者”提高 10% 乘以埃罗伊斯协同的堆叠总层数。

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_amplification_amount,100","description":"Increases the effect of Echo's Amplification ability by 100%"}
{"effect_string":"buff_amplification_amount,100","description":"Increases the effect of Echo's Amplification ability by 100%"}
{"effect_string":"buff_amplification_amount,100","description":"Increases the effect of Echo's Amplification ability by 100%"}

description.desc: Increases the damage of Champions within two slots of Sentry by $(amount)% if Sentry is in the front-most column of the formation.
如果哨兵处于阵型的最前列，则提升距离哨兵 2 格内勇士的伤害 $(amount)%
Increases the quest requirement reduction of Echo Resolution to 30%.
使回声决心的任务要求降低 30%

description.original: Perhaps we should hit a bit harder next time.
description.display: 也许下次我们下手应该重一点。

description.original: Trust me. You just put the plate up to your face. Doesn't it feel wonderful!?
description.display: 相信我，就把盘子举到你脸的高度。感觉是不是很奇妙？

description.original: I've got a spare panel here somewhere...
description.display: 我在哪儿还放了一块备用的护甲片来着......

description.original: Echo, to my side!
description.display: 回声，到我身侧！

description.original: True power comes with friends at your side.
description.display: 真正的力量来自你身边的朋友。

description.original: I shall not misuse this power.
description.display: 我不会滥用这种力量。

description.original: I will not fail again.
description.display: 我不会再失败了。

description.original: I can handle the drider. You should deal with the spellcaster.
description.display: 我能处理这个蛛化精灵。你应该来处理这个咒术师。

description.original: Is this how it's done? Do I look like a doll?
description.display: 是这么做的吗？我看起来像个玩偶吗？

description.original: I am far from my past, but exactly where I should be to assist.
description.display: 我已远离过去，但这正是我应该帮忙的地方。

description.original: My new home will be protected.
description.display: 我的新家将受到保护。

description.original: I'm on it!
description.display: 交给我吧！

description.original: There is more where that came from.
description.display: 还有更多的来源。

description.original: I... I can still feel a connection to The Prime Matrix.
description.display: 我……我仍然能感觉到与原始矩阵的联系。

effects.description: Sentry also counts as a Half-Elf

description.original: I can go further, I promise.
description.display: 我还可以走得更远，我保证。

description.original: Foes assail me, but my shield echoes my will: unyielding, unbroken.
description.display: 敌人攻击我，但我的盾牌回荡着我的意志：不屈不挠，坚不可摧。

description.original: A good axe is a fine companion for the road ahead!
description.display: 优秀的斧头是出门远行必备的好伙伴！

description.original: Well forged, well weighted. Much easier to swing!
description.display: 做工优良，体积轻盈。更适合挥砍！

description.original: A wonderful axe! To drive back evil's reaching grasp!
description.display: 非常奇妙的斧头！可以将邪恶的触角砍掉！

description.original: I feel the might of Solwynn guide my hand! It feels like home again!
description.display: 我感觉到索尔文的力量在驱使我的双手！感觉像回到了家一样！

description.original: I like to feel the texture of the tree. It feels more alive.
description.display: 我喜欢感受树木的纹理。这样它才会更有生气。

description.original: It's taken a beating, but it's still solid.
description.display: 虽然受到了重创，但依然很坚固。

description.original: I defend the defenseless
description.display: 我保护无法自保的人。

description.original: My city, my history, my goal, my future.
description.display: 我的城市、我的历史、我的目标、我的未来。

description.original: Sometimes its hard to keep them still during battle.
description.display: 在战斗中往往很难照顾得好自己的藤蔓。

description.original: They help me feel more 'human'.
description.display: 这样会让我感觉更加的“人性化”。

description.original: Hold onto something!
description.display: 快找东西抓紧！

description.original: Aila helps me braid them.
description.display: 是艾拉帮我编织的。

description.original: It matches my hair vines. Seems like the logical choice.
description.display: 跟我的青丝藤蔓的颜色很搭配。所以我选择了它。

description.original: Humans enjoy covering themselves in colorful fabric.
description.display: 人类都喜欢穿得花花绿绿的。

description.original: Sometimes I hide warm plates under it.
description.display: 我偶尔会在长袍下穿些温暖的板甲。

name.display: 埃罗伊斯英雄们的战袍

description.original: I cleaned it up after my resurrection.
description.display: 我复活后有清洗过它。

description.original: Oh! Hello there!
description.display: 啊！你好！

description.original: This is Echo. They are here to help.
description.display: 这是埃侯。他们是来帮忙的。

description.original: You think this look is cool? Just wait.
description.display: 你以为这样的装扮就很帅了？等着瞧吧。

description.original: Power stores depleted slightly, but the results are. . . lovely.
description.display: 库存能量稍微下降，但是成果......非常美丽。

description.original: It holds the symbol of my city.
description.display: 它象征着我的城市。

description.original: What do you mean, 'it's for pants'?
description.display: 你什么意思？什么叫用来“绑裤子”的？

description.original: Wearing this makes me feel closer to home.
description.display: 穿着它让我有种回到家的感觉。

description.original: I will fight to unlock the past until my last bolt rusts.
description.display: 为了解密过往，我愿意战斗到最后一枚螺丝生锈为止。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Warforged Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CON score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a LAWFUL alignment

character_sheet_details.backstory: Sentry, protector of the Kingdom of Solwynn, is an ancient relic on her plane. Long ago, a dark power obliterated Sentry's peaceful home, forcing her to power down until a new purpose could wake her. Now, with her ceremonial axe, and memories of Solwynn guiding her, Sentry devotes herself to protecting the friends fighting alongside her. Despite being thrust into a new world eons beyond the one she knew, Sentry defends the good of the world from the dark reaches of evil's grasp. She will not fail again.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Sentry buffs her fellow Champions from the front of the formation. Her companion, Echo, provides further buffs based on the formation's combat state.

event_upgrades.name: Guardian of Solwynn
event_upgrades.description: Sentry buffs Champions within two slots of herself as long as she's in the front column of the formation.

event_upgrades.name: Create Echo
event_upgrades.description: Sentry's companion, Echo, buffs the party in unique ways depending on its combat status throughout each area.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 哨兵是索尔文王国的保护者，是她所在位面的一件古老遗物。很久以前，一股黑暗的力量摧毁了哨兵平静的家园并迫使她陷入沉眠，直到有新的目标将她唤醒。如今，哨兵带着她的仪式之斧和对索尔文的记忆，致力于保护与她并肩作战的朋友。尽管被推入一个超越她所认知世界的新时代，哨兵仍然捍卫着世界的美好，使其不受邪恶黑暗的控制。她不会再失败。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 哨兵会从阵型前排为其他同伴勇士提供增益，她的战友回声能够根据阵型的战斗状态提供进一步的增益。

event_upgrades.name: 索尔文的守护者
event_upgrades.description: 只要哨兵处于阵型前排，她就会为自己身边两格内的勇士提供增益。

event_upgrades.description: 哨兵的伙伴回声根据其在每个区域的战斗状态，为整个队伍提供独特的增益。

display.name: 凌乱的藤蔓
display.description: 在战斗中往往很难照顾得好自己的藤蔓。

display.name: 缠绕藤蔓

display.name: 百花青丝藤蔓
display.description: 是艾拉帮我编织的。

original.description: It matches my hair vines. Seems like the logical choice.

display.name: 绿色战袍
display.description: 跟我的青丝藤蔓的颜色很搭配。所以我选择了它。

original.description: This is Echo. They are here to help.

display.name: 感知宝石
display.description: 这是埃侯。他们是来帮忙的。

original.name: Echo
original.description: You think this look is cool? Just wait.

display.name: 埃侯
display.description: 你以为这样的装扮就很帅了？等着瞧吧。

original.name: Festive Echo
original.description: Power stores depleted slightly, but the results are. . . lovely.

display.name: 节庆埃侯
display.description: 库存能量稍微下降，但是成果......非常美丽。

original.name: Ancient Belt
original.description: It holds the symbol of my city.

display.name: 远古腰带
display.description: 它象征着我的城市。

original.name: Solid Belt
original.description: What do you mean, 'it's for pants'?

display.name: 坚固的腰带
display.description: 你什么意思？什么叫用来“绑裤子”的？

original.name: Ceremonial Belt
original.description: Wearing this makes me feel closer to home.

display.name: 仪式用腰带
display.description: 穿着它让我有种回到家的感觉。

original.name: Studded Belt of Solwynn
original.description: I will fight to unlock the past until my last bolt rusts.

display.name: 索尔文的铆钉腰带
display.description: 为了解密过往，我愿意战斗到最后一枚螺丝生锈为止。
